alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a ketone attached to two phenyl groups.
alternative_parents.name: Benzophenones

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a three ring system containing a pyrrole ring fused on either side to a benzene ring.
alternative_parents.name: Carbazoles

alternative_parents.description: Aromatic compounds containing a ketone substituted by one aryl group, and a phenyl group.
alternative_parents.name: Aryl-phenylketones

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a carboxylic acid group (or a derivative thereof) linked to an indole.
alternative_parents.name: Indolecarboxylic acids and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing an indole moiety that carries an alkyl chain at the 1-position.
alternative_parents.name: N-alkylindoles

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing an indole moiety, which consists of pyrrole ring fused to benzene  to form 2,3-benzopyrrole.
alternative_parents.name: Indoles

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an acyl moiety of benzoic acid with the formula (C6H5CO-).
alternative_parents.name: Benzoyl derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a benzene ring which bears a methane group.
alternative_parents.name: Toluenes

alternative_parents.description: Heterocyclic compounds containing a pyrrole ring substituted at one or more positions.
alternative_parents.name: Substituted pyrroles

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an ester derivative of the oxime functional group.
alternative_parents.name: Oxime esters

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing an aromatic ring where a carbon atom is linked to an hetero atom.
alternative_parents.name: Heteroaromatic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing acetic acid as its acid component.
alternative_parents.name: Acetate salts

alternative_parents.description: Carboxylic acids containing exactly one carboxyl groups.
alternative_parents.name: Monocarboxylic acids and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an heterocycle with at least one nitrogen atom and one carbon atom linked to each other.
alternative_parents.name: Azacyclic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a bond between carbon a pnictogen atom. Pnictogens are p-block element atoms that are in the group 15 of the periodic table.
alternative_parents.name: Organopnictogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds consisting of an assembly of cations and anions.
alternative_parents.name: Organic salts

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Organic compounds containing an indole, which is a bicyclic ring system made up of a six-membered benzene ring fused to a five-membered nitrogen-containing pyrrole ring.
class.name: Indoles and derivatives

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as benzoylindoles. These are organic compounds containing an indole attached to a benzoyl moiety through the acyl group.

direct_parent.description: Organic compounds containing an indole attached to a benzoyl moiety through the acyl group.
direct_parent.name: Benzoylindoles

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organic compounds containing an indole attached to a benzoyl moiety through the acyl group.
subclass.name: Benzoylindoles

superclass.description: Compounds containing a ring with least one carbon atom and one non-carbon atom.
superclass.name: Organoheterocyclic compounds
